place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Beachfront Koi-Pond Pool Villa - Bophut
note: Fully staffed · private chef · + tax & service
blurb: An elegant beachfront villa of 1,075 m² in a managed residence estate at Bophut, with sweeping views across Bophut Beach. Six low-rise pavilions lead to a 12-metre seafront infinity pool, with a koi pond and stepping stones connecting to the dining pavilion. Fully staffed with a private chef; a short drive to Fisherman’s Village.
detail:
An elegant four-bedroom beachfront villa offering sweeping views across Bophut Beach, the 1,075 m² property sits within a managed residence estate just a short drive from the lively Fisherman’s Village.

The layout features six low-rise pavilions leading toward a spectacular 12-metre seafront infinity pool. The air-conditioned living room opens to a sea view and is adorned with white tiled floors, plush sofas and Asian-inspired décor. A koi pond with stepping stones connects to the dining pavilion, which seats ten around a timber table beside a modern kitchen and breakfast bar; both pavilions open on three sides for effortless indoor-outdoor living.

Days here are spent in poolside bliss — sun loungers and umbrellas line the glistening blue-tiled pool, ideal for basking in the sun or indulging in a massage or yoga session, while a beachfront sala offers the perfect setting for relaxed lunches, barbecues or romantic dinners under the stars. Four stylish en-suite bedrooms accommodate up to eight guests, finished with natural stone, teakwood floors and Thai accents; the largest adds a luxurious bathtub. Fully staffed with a private chef, with kayaks and a BBQ grill available on request. The shoreline in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: Kayaks & BBQ on request · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
